---
title: "Section 1: Outbreak Context"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Introducing the Outbreak](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd)

- [Why Vaccine Effectiveness Matters](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01-sp02.qmd)

- [Key Public Health Questions](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01-sp03.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">

            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Foundations of Outbreak Investigation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>

        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Introducing the Outbreak</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
